affected_selectors: 0. 研究与执行原则（每次新会话首先阅读）

registry_change_assertions.reason: Register the user-approved E7-Q2 v4.3 fixed-budget long-run protocol, preserve the v4.2 pilot as pilot-only evidence, and remove gate-driven early stopping without changing E7 scientific responsibility, data, model, learning rates, or formal seeds.
